faqs.answer: Chzzk 播放器的浏览器兼容问题,出在你浏览器和 Naver 视频栈之间,跟 我们的平台 上的存档录像没关系。我们的录像用标准 HLS 播放,所以哪怕是放不动 Chzzk 直播播放器的浏览器,也能正常回看录像。

## Joilive 直播录像

Joilive 不存档。你的个人资料上没有重播标签,没有过往直播列表,没有 VOD。这个平台完全围绕直播这一刻构建 — 你停止播出时,直播就没了。对于轻量级的短直播,这没问题,但如果你定期直播并希望作品留下来,那就是个真问题了。我们的平台 让 Joilive 主播 **录制自己的直播**,这样每场直播都会变成可以在个人创作者主页上观看、可分享的视频。

### Joilive 的黑屏问题

如果你试过用桌面录制器（OBS Studio 的显示器捕获、Windows 上的 Xbox Game Bar、Mac 上的 QuickTime）录制自己的 Joilive 直播,你大概都注意到了同一件事:音频录得很好,但视频显示为一块黑色的方框。这是 Joilive 网页播放器使用硬件加速解码加上 Widevine DRM 的结果。录制器看得到播放器,但看不到视频画面。这不是 Joilive 的 bug,也不是你的录制器坏了 — 这是受保护视频在现代浏览器上合成的副作用,在你机器上改设置改不好。

实际可行的解决办法是完全跳过屏幕录制。我们的平台 在浏览器之上的位置捕获 Joilive 直播,DRM/合成路径根本不参与。没有黑屏、不用找编解码器、不用切换 GPU 加速开关 — 录制就是能用。

### 自录,服务端运行

你在录自己的直播,但你不需要为此运行任何东西。手机上不装应用,电脑上不装软件。你在 Joilive 应用里开播时,录制会在云端自动开始。在沙发上、车里、咖啡店里直播都行 — 你的笔记本可以是关机的,手机可以是锁屏的。每场直播结束时,你的 Joilive 直播会出现在你的创作者主页上,准备好在浏览器中回看。

### 观看和下载你的 Joilive 录像

每场录制好的直播都可以在任何现代浏览器中即时播放,不需要应用,看也不需要 Joilive 账号。高级主播可以下载原始视频文件用于编辑、重新上传或本地归档 — 而 ClipAI 可以从录像自动生成发布到 TikTok、YouTube Shorts 或 Reels 的短视频。

### 直播的可分享 URL

Joilive 自己的房间 URL 是 `joilive.net/user/index.html?s=1880…` — 一串没人能打字或记住的长数字 ID。你的 我们的平台 录像使用像 `livestreamrecorder.com/joilive/your-id/video/...` 这样干净的 URL,可以发到 Discord、贴到 Twitter 简介里,或者短信发给粉丝。同样的内容,没有查询字符串,也没有强制安装应用。

### 为 Joilive 主播打造,而不是与他们为敌

我们的平台 并不是在下载别人的直播。录制由 Joilive 主播为 **自己的** 账号主动选择,而且只针对自己的直播 — 别的什么都不管。视频归你,页面归你,删除是一键操作。免费注册、添加你的 Joilive 用户 ID,Joilive 缺失的存档就不再是你的问题了。

## 我们的平台 上的 17live 录制

17live(发音 *yi-qi live* — 一起,意为「在一起」)是亚洲第三大直播平台,2015 年于台湾创立,2021 年起总部位于日本,在 SGX 以 **LVR** 上市。同时托管 **Liver**(人类主播)与 **V-Liver**(虚拟形象主播 — 17live 开创的类别)。在日本、台湾、香港、新加坡和菲律宾尤为强势。我们的平台 将您直播的每一场 Live 的完整可在网页访问的录制 — 与 17live 应用内的 Stream Archive 并行存放在公开网络上。

### 17live 已经有 Stream Archive,为什么还要第二份录制?

17live 自己的 Stream Archive 没问题 — 它把近期直播保存在 17live App 内,由您的权限开关控制。但粉丝需要 17live App 才能观看,存档不会被 Google 收录,每场直播也没有稳定的公开 URL 可贴在 Discord 或 Twitter 简介里。我们的平台 是**补充**而非竞争:把同一场直播第二次捕获,这次落到一个公开网址,比如 `livestreamrecorder.com/live17/your-id/video/...`,任何浏览器都能立即打开。

### Liver 与 V-Liver 同样的捕获

我们录制 17live 实际播出的画面 — 无论您是聊天/唱歌/跳舞的真人 Liver、有自定义场景的 OBS 合成 Liver,还是运行 Live2D / 3D 形象的 V-Liver。捕获在 17live 分发之前发生,所以最终视频与粉丝在直播中看到的完全一致:形象、叠加、变声、礼物动画全部保留。

### 手机不用 App,电脑不用 OBS

服务器端。从手机或电脑像平常一样直播,录制在我们的基础设施里进行。直播开始后,您的手机可以休眠,笔记本可以关机 — 录制继续。设备没有 CPU 占用、GPU 负担、额外耗电。这对持续 4 小时以上的歌唱或谈话直播很重要。

### 超越 90 秒的剪辑限制

17live App 内的 Stream Clips 在 App 内分享时很棒,但被限制在 15-90 秒,并且不会离开 17live 表面。高级主播可以在 我们的平台 上使用 ClipAI 从完整保存的直播中剪出任意长度的精选片段,适配 **TikTok、Instagram Reels、YouTube Shorts** — 这些正是大多数 17live 外的潜在观众实际所在的平台。把它们用作把粉丝引回 17live 直播间的漏斗。

### 同等支持经纪签约与独立主播

17live 的经纪管理系统主动发掘和支持主播 — 这是它区别于纯自助 App 的特色。我们的平台 不会触碰任何这些。它不登录您的 17live 账号,不干涉 Hot Star 活动、礼物推广或经纪公司工具。它是被动的并行录制 — 您来控制,您的 URL,您的存档。

### 浏览器中观看,需要时下载

每一场 17live 录制都能在任何现代浏览器中即时播放。观看不需要 17live 账号 — 把 URL 分享给任何人、任何地方。高级创作者可以从每场直播下载原始 HEVC 视频文件用于再编辑、作为长视频 VOD 上传到 YouTube,或本地存档。

### 主动开启,您自己的内容

我们的平台 只录制您自己的主页,只在您主动开启之后。法律地位与从 17live 应用内的 Stream Archive 下载您自己的直播相同 — 只是存储在不同的位置(不是在 App 内,而是在您自己域名上的公开网址)。随时可停止录制,任何录制都可一键删除。

about.nimotv:
## NimoTV Live Recordings on 我们的平台

NimoTV (launched 2018 by Huya, part of Tencent's global gaming ecosystem) is the international mobile-esports streaming platform — purpose-built for the mobile-gaming explosion happening across **Brazil, Indonesia, Thailand, Mexico, and Peru**. The catalogue is dominated by **Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, Free Fire, PUBG Mobile, Call of Duty: Mobile, Wild Rift, and Arena of Valor**. Its creator base is mostly phone-only — no PC, no OBS, no capture card. When a ranked grind ends, the broadcast is gone. 我们的平台 catches every match before it disappears, on a public web URL fans can rewatch anytime.

### Phone-Only Capture, Server-Side

The NimoTV creator workflow is brutally simple: open the NimoTV app, hit go-live, play the game, end the stream. There's no native VOD export. There's no "keep my last broadcast for replay" button you can rely on across regions and account tiers. And a phone running a ranked Mobile Legends match doesn't have spare resources to also run a screen recorder in the background — thermals, FPS, battery, and data all suffer. 我们的平台 runs entirely in our cloud. Your phone broadcasts on NimoTV the way it always has; we capture the stream upstream and store it on your creator page.

### Full-Length Matches, Not 30-Second Clips

Mobile esports matches are long. MLBB ranked grinds run hours, Free Fire squads rotate through round after round, PUBG Mobile final-circle hunts can stretch a broadcast past 4 hours. NimoTV's in-app clip and replay surfaces, where they exist, are short-form by design. 我们的平台 saves the full broadcast — every match, every draft phase, every comms moment — at full length, ready to scrub. Want to review a teamfight you lost? Pull the recording, jump to the timestamp. Want a specific MVP highlight for a thumbnail? Clip it from the saved Live.

### Brazilian and Indonesian Discovery, the Open Web Way

NimoTV is huge inside its app in Brazil and SE Asia. It is also almost completely invisible on the open Portuguese, Spanish, and Indonesian web. Search for a top Brazilian MLBB streamer on Google and you'll get thin profile pages, third-party trackers, or nothing useful. Your 我们的平台 creator page is indexable, shareable, and openable in any browser — your Lives finally get a real Google footprint.

### Cross-Posting to Where Mobile Gaming Fans Actually Hang Out

#MLBB, #FreeFire, #PUBGM, #MobileGaming — the mobile esports community lives across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Discord, and language-specific community apps. Most don't have the NimoTV app installed and aren't going to install it to watch one stream. ClipAI scans your saved NimoTV Lives and cuts vertical highlight clips formatted for **TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts** — clutch plays, MVP moments, gift reactions. Use them as the funnel that brings new fans back to your NimoTV channel.

### Watch in Browser, Download if You Need It

Every saved NimoTV Live plays instantly in any modern browser. No NimoTV account needed to watch. Premium creators can download the raw video file from each Live — useful for uploading full matches to YouTube as long-form gaming content, cutting compilations, or local archival.

### Doesn't Touch Your NimoTV Account or Diamond Income

## VK Live Recordings on 我们的平台

VK Live is the livestreaming layer inside **VKontakte (VK)**, Russia's biggest social network with over 100 million monthly active users. Unlike standalone streaming apps, VK Live is woven directly into VK's social graph — broadcasts appear in friends' feeds, get reposted into communities, integrate with **VK Music** and the **VK Play** gaming platform, and reach an audience that spans Russia, Belarus, Kazakhstan, and Russian-speaking communities worldwide. Since 2022, when Western livestreaming options became harder to access from Russia, VK Live has grown significantly as the de-facto livestreaming home for Russian-speaking creators. 我们的平台 records every VK Live broadcast to a stable, public web URL — built for creators who want their work to outlive a single news cycle in the VK feed.

### The VK Feed Buries Streams Within Hours

VK Live is a social-first stream surface. The strength of that design: a Live shows up in followers' feeds in real time, can be reposted into communities, pulls live engagement from the VK social graph. The weakness of that design: the VK algorithm prioritizes fresh content. Within a few hours of going offline, your broadcast slides down the feed. Within 24 hours, even popular VK Lives are effectively invisible to anyone who didn't catch them live. There's no proper archive UX, no dedicated past-streams view on your profile. Fans who'd love to rewatch a Dota 2 match, share a music set with a friend, or pull up that one clutch CS round you had last weekend have no real place to go.

我们的平台 gives every VK Live broadcast a stable URL on your creator page that exists independently of the VK feed cycle. The feed moves on, your archive stays.

### Built for the VK Live Creator Mix

VK Live's creator base is broad and category-rich. **Gaming**: Dota 2, CS 2, World of Tanks, Standoff 2 — the cornerstones of the Russian-speaking gaming community. **Music**: artists running album drops, acoustic sets, electronic DJ sets, often integrated with their VK Music releases. **IRL and lifestyle**: vlog-style streams, cooking, travel (where geopolitics allows), commentary on news and pop culture. **Anime and manga commentators**: reaction streams, watch-alongs, deep-dive discussions. **Educational**: language learning, coding tutorials, exam prep. The capture is upstream of your local hardware, so whatever you broadcast — OBS scene composition, gameplay overlays, music visualisers, webcam-only chat — preserves exactly as your fans saw it.

### A Permanent Home for Long-Form Content

The VK feed is built for short attention spans — quick scrolling, fast engagement, fresh posts every few hours. That's fine for a 2-minute clip and actively hostile to a 3-hour Dota grind or a 90-minute concert set. A permanent archive on 我们的平台 is the long-form counterpart: fans who want to actually sit with your stream, rewatch a specific match, or share a moment with a friend get a stable URL that works the same way next week and next year. The clip lives in the feed; the full broadcast lives on your creator page.

### Russian, CIS, and Diaspora Audiences

VK is dominant inside Russia, Belarus, and Kazakhstan, but Russian-speaking communities also live throughout Europe, Israel, the US, and Canada — many of whom don't actively maintain a VK account day-to-day. 我们的平台 URLs work in any browser, anywhere in the world, with no VK login required to watch. Your diaspora fans get a way to keep up with your work that doesn't depend on them maintaining an active VK presence.

### Cross-Platform Reach with ClipAI

ClipAI scans your saved VK Live broadcasts and cuts vertical short-form clips ready for **TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts**, and VK's own short-video features. Highlight plays from a Dota match, music drops from a concert set, funny chat moments, IRL reactions — turn one long broadcast into a stream of shareable content that brings new fans back to your VK Live channel.

### Watch in Browser, Download if You Need It

Every saved VK Live plays instantly in any modern browser, no VK account required. Premium creators can download the raw video file from each broadcast — useful for re-uploading full matches to YouTube as long-form content, cutting compilations, or local archival on your own machine.

### Doesn't Touch Your VK Account or Integrations

我们的平台 never logs into your VK account, doesn't interact with VK Music tags, doesn't touch VK Play integrations, and doesn't affect any of VK's creator-side metrics, monetization, or community management. The recording is opt-in by you as the VK Live creator for **your own** account, and only captures your own broadcasts — nothing else. Your VK profile, community pages, friend graph, and creator status stay entirely within VK.

### Opt-In, Delete Anytime

我们的平台 only records your own profile, only after you opt in. Stop the recording flow any time. Delete any past VK Live with a single click. Your content, your URL, your control — a permanent archive of your work on the open web, where the VK feed buries streams fast but your back catalogue stays put.
about.chzzk:
## 在 我们的平台 上观看 Chzzk 录像

Chzzk(치지직)是韩国最大互联网公司 **Naver** 运营的直播平台,2023 年 12 月进入公测,2024 年 4 月正式上线 — 时间点正好与 Twitch 退出韩国市场重合。Naver 配套推出了一键 Twitch 导入工具,把主播原本在 Twitch 上的关注者和订阅一次性带过来,Chzzk 也因此承接了韩国最受关注的一大批直播红人,成了他们的新家。「치지직」本身是一个拟声词,模仿的是老式阴极射线管电视在频道之间调台时那种「沙沙」的雪花噪声 — 就是老电视搜到信号那一瞬间的声音,Naver 选这个名字是要唤起一场直播刚刚接通画面的那一刻。截至 2026 年初,Chzzk 在韩国直播观看时长中拿下大约 39% 的份额,以最高 1080p 60fps、8 Mbps 码率播出,明显高于 Twitch 在 2022 年末下调后的上限。我们的平台 按原画质捕获 Chzzk Live,并以永久网址提供回看 — 任何浏览器都能打开,不需要 Naver 账号。

### 这里能回看什么内容

录像来自从 Twitch 韩国关停之后迁过来的韩国综艺与游戏主播 — 长时间的闲聊直播、动辄半天的订阅马拉松、在新平台积累人气的音乐和 IRL 主播,还有转播 League of Legends Champions Korea(LCK)赛事的电竞合作频道(Naver 拿到了 2026 至 2030 年的 LCK 韩语独家转播权,与 SOOP Korea 共同持有)。每场 Live 都按完整时长捕获,不是剪过的精华片段,这样直播的整条节奏 — 铺垫、高光、以及高光之间那段长长的过渡 — 才能从头到尾保留下来。

### 为什么还要一份独立存档

Chzzk 自己提供 VOD 和短剪辑,但 VOD 是逐场由主播决定开不开的,很多主播在订阅马拉松、商务合作和不希望被完整重看的活动场次里干脆把开关关掉。Live 结束时如果 VOD 是关着的,这场直播在 Chzzk 那边就直接没了。即便开了 VOD,保留时间也是有上限的 — 较老的直播会被滚出去,主播偶尔也会自己删除过往 Live,而 Chzzk 的剪辑系统呈现的是「瞬间」而不是「过程」,所以一场四小时的订阅马拉松靠剪辑根本拼不回来。我们的平台 上的存档则是这场原始直播在网上一个独立存在的永久网址 — 主播开不开 VOD、Chzzk 留多久、是不是只有剪辑、事后是不是删了,这四道坎都和它无关。
